title: valerianella corniculata
intro: Valerianella corniculata, also known as creeping valerian or corn spurry, is a low-growing, annual or biennial herb belonging to the family Valerianaceae. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Valerianella corniculata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support digestive well-being. Valerianella corniculata is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues.
